title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, an LLM optimized for coding tasks and agent swarm orchestration. The model represents maturation in the Chinese AI lab ecosystem with improvements over K2.5.
